<mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/ja/dtd" xmlns:xoe="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/xoe/dtd" xmlns:bk="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/bk/dtd" xmlns:cals="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/cals/dtd" xmlns:ce="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/dtd" xmlns:ja="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/ja/dtd" xmlns:sa="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/struct-aff/dtd" xmlns:sb="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/struct-bib/dtd" xmlns:tb="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/table/dtd" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xmlns:xocs="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/xocs/dtd" xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:dcterms="http://purl.org/dc/terms/" xmlns:prism="http://prismstandard.org/namespaces/basic/2.0/" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" altimg="si328.gif" display="block" overflow="scroll">

formulas.latex: e^{- \delta^{2} \mu_{t} / 4} = e^{- \mu_{t} / \left(4 t^{2}\right)} \leq e^{- \left(C \sqrt{\overset{̄}{\tau}} \sqrt{log m \overset{̄}{\tau}} / 3\right) / \left(4 B\right)} = e^{- C^{2} log m \overset{̄}{\tau} / 36} = \left(\frac{1}{m \overset{̄}{\tau}}\right)^{C^{2} / 36} .
